caption: A man sits outdoors against a weathered green wall featuring a white star emblem. He is wearing a light-colored, long-sleeved button-down shirt and dark pants. He sits atop a wooden block, holding a yellow bag in his right hand while resting his left hand near his chin. The ground consists of dry, sandy earth. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a static seated position, maintaining a contemplative expression. White text appears at the bottom of the screen, evolving across the frames. Initially, the text reads, "Your neighbor is an example, he gets ahead, he proved to you". This phrase remains constant through the first three frames. In the final frame, the text changes to "that when we want something we aim for it,".
